'''Tienn Tubb''' was an elderly [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. Although nearly blind, he retained excellent hearing. He was a mechanic and scientist on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] during the year [[3951 BBY]], assisted by [[IT-31]] and [[TT-32-GE3|TT-32]]. Though disregarded by many, he was quite skilled, having created a renewable droid shield that could be raised and lowered a near-infinite number of times. [[Meetra Surik]] sought his aid in creating a new ID for the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Cut content from Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords|cut content]] of the game, Tienn was [[Bao-Dur]]'s old friend from the [[Mandalorian Wars]] when they worked together in the hangar bays and were part of the [[12th Engineering Division]] under the command of the Jedi Exile.

==Appearances==
